questions.q: Which level of government records a birth or a marriage?
questions.explanation: Vital records are kept by state and local governments.

questions.q: Who mainly provides and funds public schools?
questions.explanation: Public education is largely a state and local responsibility.

questions.q: Which federal program provides retirement and disability benefits?
questions.explanation: Social Security provides retirement and disability income.

questions.q: Which federal program provides health coverage for people 65 and older?
questions.explanation: Medicare is the federal health-insurance program for seniors.

questions.q: What does lifelong civic participation include?
options: Voting, jury service, and community involvement
questions.explanation: Citizenship is an ongoing, two-way relationship.
